title: Cryopreservation of Human Adult Ventricular Tissue for Myocardial Slices
author: Lodrini, Groeneveld, et al.
materials: Fresh human cardiac tissue (at least ∼1 cm3)
Cryopreservation medium (Gibco CTS Synth‐a‐Freeze Medium; Thermo Fisher, cat. no. A1371301)
Specimen container (e.g., sterile 50‐mL tube with 10 mL of culture medium or slicing solution)
Cryovials (Nunc Biobanking and Cell Culture Cryogenic Tubes; Thermo Scientific, cat. no. 366656)

steps.title: PREPARATION AND PRESERVATION OF HUMAN ADULT MYOCARDIUM
steps.instruction: This protocol outlines a straightforward method for preparing human adult ventricular myocardium for cryopreservation.

steps.title: PREPARATION OF ADULT LIVING MYOCARDIAL SLICES FROM CRYOPRESERVED BLOCKS
steps.instruction: This protocol illustrates how to prepare LMS from cryopreserved blocks of tissue prepared using the previous protocol.
